calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Fung for Chi Ho (Administrator).

Ms. Fung stated that she had nothing to add, that she is satisfied with the Parties understanding of the disclaimers and that the Parties are satisfied with the Brother getting the property. The Court granted the petition for final distribution (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-27-2014 Continued To Sep-17-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-13-2014 Continued To Aug-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Fung for Chi Ho (Administrator).

The accounting petition was continued to August 27, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide further authority to support her position with regard to the issue of the disclaimers being filed timely.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
